title: polemonium incisum
intro: Polemonium incisum, also known as Sky Pilot, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western mountain regions of North America. The plant contains iridoid glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polemonium incisum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions or tinctures, which can be used to make teas or added to salves and creams for topical application.
